scope: 独立审计 plan-019-verification-environment-metadata：验证 verify run 环境元数据实现、旧记录兼容性、非目标遵守、文档同步和回归测试
rationale: Independent audit passed: environment metadata is persisted and exposed, legacy verification records remain readable, pass/fail/recursive guard paths are covered, non-goals were respected, docs are synchronized, and regression validation passed.

findings.finding: argv is descriptive metadata derived via shlex.split while commands still execute through shell=True
findings.recommendation: Document that argv is descriptive and should not be treated as the exact OS exec argv for future trust-level work
